{{Quote|I don't care if the 'official' position on her desertion is that she did no harm: if any of the Eclipse Team ever sees her again, we'll be the last people she'll ever see.|Lieutenant Akul Witig on Mosara Thiirn|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Mosara Thiirn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]], and later a field engineer for [[Hydrospeare Corporation]]. She began working as a [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForce]] technician, stationed aboard a technical frigate.

==Biography==

Thiirn took part in the [[Battle of Archais]], where the Rebel Alliance SpecForces (including [[Shroud Team]] and [[Midnight Squadron|Midnight]] and [[Storm Squadron (Rebel)|Storm Squadrons]] from [[Eclipse Team]]) fought the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces in the oriental [[Ocean/Legends|seas]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Archais]].<ref name="AIR" />

During the battle, and with the Rebel forces in danger, she chose to desert her position and surrender herself and her [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to the Imperial commander, [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Freja Covell]]. This made her particularly disliked among the Rebel survivors of the battle, who blamed her for the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of many of their friends.<ref name="AIR" />

However, Covell soon found that Thiirn's desertion was of little use for the Empire: Being on a mobile base, Thiirn was unaware of the location of any Rebel base, and all the Rebel officers she knew were already on [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence's]] most wanted lists. Although her desertion only served for immediate purposes related to the battle, they could not use her to damage the Alliance any further—even if she wanted to.<ref name="AIR" />

Thiirn became a field technician for Imperial-aligned Hydrospeare Corporation, and she even became a field engineer for the elite [[Design Team Beta]]. She mistakenly thought she was an essential part of the Team. A lithe, light-skinned woman, Thiirn braided her dark hair in the Imperial military fashion required of women officers aboard fleet ships, although she was not an Imperial officer.<ref name="AIR" />

Rebel veteran of Archais [[Akul Witig]] wrote a report on Thiirn, specifying that the Eclipse Team would kill Thiirn if they could find her. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] would rather capture her, but he understood it would be impossible if Witig or [[Palpatine Essex Yerac|P. Essex Yerac]] found her first.<ref name="AIR" />
